---
title: "Resources"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

A curated collection of learning resources organised by topic.
Use the table of contents on the right to jump between sections.

<!--
  FORMATTING RECOMMENDATIONS
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  • Use H2 headings for each major category and H3 for sub-categories.
    The right-hand TOC (toc-depth: 2) lets readers jump to any section.
  • For very long resource lists consider:
    – Collapsible sections (use Quarto's ::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"})
    – Separate sub-pages linked from this index
    – Tabsets for closely related topics (shown below)
  • Keep descriptions short (one or two sentences per link).
-->

## Large Language Models (LLMs)

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Andrej Karpathy – Neural Networks: Zero to Hero](https://karpathy.ai/zero-to-hero.html) | Video lecture series building neural nets from scratch |
| [Hugging Face Course](https://huggingface.co/course) | Free NLP course using the Transformers library |

: {.striped .hover}

## Machine Learning

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Courses

- [fast.ai](https://www.fast.ai/) — Practical deep learning for coders
- [Stanford CS229](https://cs229.stanford.edu/) — Machine Learning

### Books

- *An Introduction to Statistical Learning* — James, Witten, Hastie, Tibshirani
- *Hands-On Machine Learning* — Aurélien Géron

### Tools & Libraries

- [scikit-learn](https://scikit-learn.org/)
- [PyTorch](https://pytorch.org/)
- [XGBoost](https://xgboost.readthedocs.io/)

:::

## Statistics

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Bayesian Statistics

- *Statistical Rethinking* — Richard McElreath
- [Bayesian Methods for Hackers](https://camdavidsonpilon.github.io/Probabilistic-Programming-and-Bayesian-Methods-for-Hackers/)
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Causal Inference

- *Causal Inference: The Mixtape* — Scott Cunningham
- *The Effect* — Nick Huntington-Klein
:::

## Data Engineering

- [The Data Engineering Handbook](https://github.com/DataEngineer-io/data-engineer-handbook)
- [Apache Spark Documentation](https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/)

## Favourite Books

- *Thinking, Fast and Slow* — Daniel Kahneman
- *The Book of Why* — Judea Pearl
- *Noise* — Daniel Kahneman, Olivier Sibony, Cass Sunstein
